emails.subject: Wabash Offer
emails.body: Wabash Offer I've been working with Wabash Valley Power on a long-dated position based on coal economics. The attached is a very basic model indicating what it would cost to supply this power from a newly developed coal plant in the Cinergy region. This is meant only as an educational tool for them to understand that our offer is competitive with build economics. I plan to offer them indicative pricing of $37.25 for a 10 year 7x24 strip beginning Cal '05. Fletch's offer is $35.50, but credit will clip another $1.75. I'm hoping to get credit comfortable with only $1.00. Any thoughts/objections? Mitch

emails.subject: Re: Wabash Offer
emails.body: Re: Wabash Offer Add $0.50/Mwh to the off-peak component of the 7x24 price and everything else looks fine.
